member.name: T:CastBrick.SDK.CastBrickApiException
member.summary: Thrown when the CastBrick API returns a non-success HTTP status.

member.name: P:CastBrick.SDK.CastBrickApiException.StatusCode
member.summary: HTTP status code returned by the API.

member.name: T:CastBrick.SDK.CastBrickClient
M:CastBrick.SDK.CastBrickClient.#ctor(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,CastBrick.SDK.CastBrickOptions)
member.summary: Initialise the CastBrick client with an and options. Use this overload when integrating with IHttpClientFactory.

member.name: M:CastBrick.SDK.CastBrickClient.#ctor(CastBrick.SDK.CastBrickOptions)
member.summary: Initialise the CastBrick client with a new (standalone usage).

member.name: T:CastBrick.SDK.CastBrickOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for the CastBrick SDK client.

member.name: P:CastBrick.SDK.CastBrickOptions.BaseUrl
member.summary: API base URL. Defaults to https://api.castbrick.com.

member.name: T:CastBrick.SDK.Models.Sms.SendSmsRequest
member.summary: Request to send one or more SMS messages.

member.name: P:CastBrick.SDK.Models.Sms.SendSmsRequest.Recipients
member.summary: List of E.164 phone numbers, e.g. "+244923000000".

member.name: P:CastBrick.SDK.Models.Sms.SendSmsRequest.ScheduledAt
member.summary: Schedule the message for future delivery (UTC).

member.name: P:CastBrick.SDK.Models.Sms.SendSmsRequest.ContactListId
member.summary: Send to all contacts in this list instead of/in addition to Recipients.

member.name: M:CastBrick.SDK.Resources.BroadcastsResource.CreateAsync(CastBrick.SDK.Models.Broadcasts.CreateBroadcastRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Create a new broadcast. Returns the new broadcast ID.

member.name: M:CastBrick.SDK.Resources.BroadcastsResource.CancelAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Cancel a queued or scheduled broadcast.

member.name: M:CastBrick.SDK.Resources.BroadcastsResource.DuplicateAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Duplicate a broadcast. Returns the new broadcast ID.

member.name: M:CastBrick.SDK.Resources.ContactsResource.CreateAsync(CastBrick.SDK.Models.Contacts.CreateContactRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Create contacts from comma/newline-separated emails or phone numbers.

member.name: M:CastBrick.SDK.Resources.ContactsResource.GetListAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get a contact list by ID.

member.name: M:CastBrick.SDK.Resources.ContactsResource.AddToListAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Add a contact to a list.

member.name: M:CastBrick.SDK.Resources.ContactsResource.RemoveFromListAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Remove a contact from a list.

member.name: M:CastBrick.SDK.Resources.SmsResource.SendAsync(CastBrick.SDK.Models.Sms.SendSmsRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Send an SMS to one or more recipients.

member.name: M:CastBrick.SDK.Resources.SmsResource.GetAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get a single SMS message by ID.
